children.label: A
children.text: Federal lands administered by the Secretary concerned; and

children.label: A
children.text: public land as defined by section 103 of the Federal Land Policy Management Act of 1976 (); or43 U.S.C. 1702

children.label: B
children.text: land of the National Forest System (as defined in ).section 1609(a) of title 16

children.label: A
children.text: for public land, a land use plan established under the Federal Land Policy and Management Act of 1976 ( et seq.); and43 U.S.C. 1701

children.label: B
children.text: for National Forest System land, a land management plan approved, amended, or revised under .section 1604 of title 16

children.heading: Eligible project
children.label: 4 Eligible project
children.text: The term “eligible project” means a project carried out on covered land that uses wind, solar, or geothermal energy to generate energy.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 5 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Interior.
